common.referenceOnly: Reference only. Not for diagnosis, treatment planning, measurements, or implant workflows.

importPage.title: CBCTer
importPage.description: Inspect CBCT (Cone Beam Computed Tomography) scans directly in the browser from local study folders. CBCTer parses supported exports locally, opens them as linked 2D slice views with a 3D volume overview, and separates individual teeth for export.
importPage.sampleDescription: Load the bundled CBCT volume to explore the viewer and tooth extraction without importing a folder.

galileos.title: GALILEOS
galileos.description: Legacy GALILEOS study volumes stored as compressed slice files.
galileos.instruction: Select the study folder that contains <0>*_vol_0</0> and <1>*_vol_0_###</1>.

oneVolume.title: OneVolume CT
oneVolume.description: Native OneVolume volume stored in CT_0.vol.
oneVolume.instruction: Select the <0>CT_*</0> folder, or the export root if you want the app to auto-detect the nested CT study folder.

dicom.title: DICOM CT
dicom.description: Standard DICOM slice stacks exported from compatible CT software.
dicom.instruction: Select the folder that contains the <0>.dcm</0> slices, usually <1>DICOM/</1>.

importPage.referenceNote: <0>Series_01/</0> is reference material only and is not imported.

folderPicker.title: Open a scan folder
folderPicker.description: Choose a local export folder to load the scan into the viewer.
folderPicker.detail: The app builds the volume in-browser and opens linked axial, sagittal, coronal, and 3D views.
folderPicker.unsupportedHint: Folder selection needs a browser with directory upload support. Safari on iPhone requires iOS 18.4+.

progress.selectFolder: Select a supported CT folder to begin

viewerSidebar.windowHint: Contrast span. Smaller window = more contrast.
viewerSidebar.levelHint: Brightness bias. Higher level favors denser tissue.
viewerSidebar.thickSliceHint: This series has thick slices, so cross-plane views are coarse.
viewerSidebar.dragHint: Drag inside any 2D pane to scrub linked slices.
viewerSidebar.zoomHint: Wheel or pinch to zoom; when zoomed, scrubbing keeps the crosshair centered when possible.
viewerSidebar.orientationHint: Coronal and sagittal views are flipped so superior anatomy stays at the top.
viewerSidebar.volumeDownsampled: Downsampled from full volume to fit GPU texture limits.
viewerSidebar.planeHint: Colored planes in 3D match the current coronal, sagittal, and axial slices.

masks.empty: No masks yet. Create a threshold mask to start a client-side layer.

surfaces.empty: No surfaces yet. Generate one from the active mask.

measures.distance: Distance: point-to-point length in calibrated millimeters.
measures.roi: ROI: ellipse and polygon area, perimeter, and density stats.
measures.empty: No saved measurements yet. Use the ruler or angle tool in a slice view.

export.surfaces: Surfaces: STL and PLY mesh export path.
export.project: Project: local package of study state and generated objects.

teeth.title: Tooth extraction
teeth.subtitle: Review separated tooth labels and export meshes.

live.title: In-browser tooth segmentation
live.description: Runs the MONAI UNet fully client-side via onnxruntime-web over an ROI of the loaded volume. No server or upload.
live.needVolume: Load the sample CBCT (or a scan folder) in the viewer first, then come back to segment an ROI.
live.sizeHint: ROI ≈ {{dims}} voxels (padded to 144³ for the model).

gen.title: Generate library in-browser
gen.description: No prebuilt library for this scan? Run the tooth model right here to separate the arch into individual teeth — no server, no Python pipeline. Adjust the region to cover the teeth, then generate.
gen.unavailableNote: No prebuilt library was found for this set.
gen.needVolume: Load a CBCT scan in the viewer first, then come back to generate a library.
gen.separationHint: Higher separates touching teeth into more pieces; lower merges them.
gen.noResults: No teeth were separated. Try enlarging the region or recentering it on the arch.

teeth.empty: No separated teeth in this set.
teeth.generateHint: Run the tooth separation pipeline against a DICOM folder to generate labels (see segment:* npm scripts).

anatomy.title: Full anatomy segmentation
anatomy.subtitle: Multi-class CBCT segmentation (DentalSegmentator nnU-Net).
anatomy.needVolume: Load a CBCT volume first to run full anatomy segmentation.
anatomy.description: Segment skull, mandible, upper/lower teeth, and the mandibular canal in one pass. Runs the nnU-Net model in your browser on the CPU (multi-threaded wasm).
anatomy.previewEmpty: Run segmentation to preview the labelled anatomy.
anatomy.perfNote: Full-volume 3D inference is heavy; the first run downloads the ~123 MB model. Multi-threaded CPU inference takes about a minute.

panoramic.title: Panoramic reconstruction
panoramic.subtitle: Unroll the dental arch into a flat panoramic (OPG-like) image.
panoramic.editHint: Click to add a point, drag to move, alt/right-click a point to remove. Auto-fit seeds the arch from bone; adjust freely.
panoramic.outputEmpty: Adjust the arch, then generate the panorama.

errors.failedToLoadSelectedScanFolder: Failed to load the selected scan folder.
errors.unsupportedFolderLayout: Unsupported folder layout. Select a GALILEOS study, a OneVolume export root, or a DICOM slice folder.
